title: ASSORTED FELT PADS 27pk
features: SELF ADHESIVE PROTECTION: 151 Love Your Wood Felt Pads, simply peel and apply to the underside of furniture legs to help protect wooden and laminate floors from furniture movement scuffs and scratches.

ASSORTED SIZES: 151 Love Your Wood Felt Pads, supplied ready to use to protect your home flooring, fits most furniture leg bases, Round - 20mm, 25mm & 40mm, Rectangle - 150mm x 15mm, Large Pad - 150mm x 115mm

QUIET FURNITURE MOVEMENT: 151 Love Your Wood Felt Pads, reduce the noise whilst moving furniture on wood, laminte, marble or smooth tiles. Apply protective pad to the base of stool, chair and table legs to prevent noise and floor scratching during movement.
ABOUT THE PRODUCT: Ready to use, pack 27 felt protectors, Round - 20mm, 25mm & 40mm, Rectangle - 150mm x 15mm, Large Pad - 150mm x 115mm
description: Product Description ASSORTED FELT PADS 27pk Safety Warning Avoid using on surfaces where slipping may occur. Ensure pads are securely attached to furniture legs.
